kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ANON_VMA_NAME
kernel_configs.justification: Performance improvements via Kernel configuration parameters - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/12178

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_AQTION
kernel_configs.justification: Enable Aquantia AQtion ethernet driver kernel configs - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/14638

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ARM_SMMU
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for VFIO to work - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6829

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ARM_SMMU_LEGACY_DT_BINDINGS
kernel_configs.justification: No device tree support needed - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6829

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ARM_SMMU_QCOM
kernel_configs.justification: Allow support of QCom SMMU, because why not? - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6829

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ARM_SMMU_QCOM_DEBUG
kernel_configs.justification: Allow support of QCom SMMU, because why not? - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6829

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ARM_SMMU_V3
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for VFIO to work - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6829

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BINFMT_MISC
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer and HCI scenarios - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3300

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BLK_CGROUP_IOLATENCY
kernel_configs.justification: Enable support for latency based cgroup IO protection - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/7794

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BLK_DEV_NBD
kernel_configs.justification: Add nbd module for customer - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/5972

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BLK_DEV_SX8
kernel_configs.justification: The sx8 block driver removed in update to 5.15.118.1 for CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel/commit/a9ad05e35412cfa69ff93603500e97b7f29a90ca

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BLK_WBT
kernel_configs.justification: kernel: Enable support for block device writeback throttling - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/14797

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BLK_WBT_MQ
kernel_configs.justification: kernel: Enable support for block device writeback throttling - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/14797

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_BPF_LSM
kernel_configs.justification: Allow customers to use BPF LSM programs - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6846

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CC_CAN_LINK_STATIC
kernel_configs.justification: Remove static linking support from the kernel - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3748

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_COMPAT_32BIT_TIME
kernel_configs.justification: Avoid error that 2 bit get_time syscalls aren't available - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3812

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CONSOLE_LOGLEVEL_DEFAULT
kernel_configs.justification: Needed to see early logging in serial console - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6888

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CRYPTO_ARC4
kernel_configs.justification: Enable FIPS crypto configs and dependencies for arm64

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CRYPTO_DEV_BCM_SPU
kernel_configs.justification: Enable FIPS crypto configs and dependencies for arm64

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CRYPTO_DH_RFC7919_GROUPS
kernel_configs.justification: kernel: enable CONFIG_CRYPTO_DH in aarch64 - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/11409

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CRYPTO_ECC
kernel_configs.justification: Enable arm64 hyperv and SoCs support - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/366

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_CUSE
kernel_configs.justification: Enable CUSE to support Nvidia rshim interface for Azure Linux hosts - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6853

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_DECNET
kernel_configs.justification: DECNET support removed in update to 5.15.118.1 for CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel/commit/2a974abc09761c05fef697fe229d1b85a7ce3918

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_DECNET_NF_GRABULATOR
kernel_configs.justification: DECNET support removed in update to 5.15.118.1 for CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel/commit/2a974abc09761c05fef697fe229d1b85a7ce3918

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_DECNET_ROUTER
kernel_configs.justification: DECNET support removed in update to 5.15.118.1 for CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel/commit/2a974abc09761c05fef697fe229d1b85a7ce3918

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_DEVICE_PRIVATE
kernel_configs.justification: Performance improvements via Kernel configuration parameters - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/12178

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_DRM_VGEM
kernel_configs.justification: Needed to enable media acceleration - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3227

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_E1000
kernel_configs.justification: Enable virtio console by default and build e1000 drivers as modules - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/10604

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_E1000E
kernel_configs.justification: Enable virtio console by default and build e1000 drivers as modules - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/10604

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_FPGA_DFL_AFU
kernel_configs.justification: Needs to be off for CVE-2023-26242 - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6574

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_FTRACE_SYSCALLS
kernel_configs.justification: Needed to enable eBPF CO-RE syscalls tracers - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3210

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_FW_LOADER_COMPRESS
kernel_configs.justification: QLogic NIC firmware in linux-firmware is compressed - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/2201

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_GDS_FORCE_MITIGATION
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for kernel upgrade 5.15.125.1. Off to prevent AVX being disabled - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/5964

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_HSA_AMD
kernel_configs.justification: Enable DRM_AMDGPU module in kernel-drivers-gpu - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/5416

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_HW_RANDOM_TPM
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ICE_SWITCHDEV
kernel_configs.justification: Enable Intel Ethernet Connection E800 networking driver - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/10960

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_INIT_ON_FREE_DEFAULT_ON
kernel_configs.justification: Creates increased boot times and errors on large memory systems - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/4829

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_IO_URING
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_IP_VS_MH
kernel_configs.justification: Add additional mh scheduler for ipvs per suggestion by customer - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/5657

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ISO9660_FS
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_KEXEC_IMAGE_VERIFY_SIG
kernel_configs.justification: Enable signature verification of kexec kernel - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/10961

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_LOCK_DOWN_IN_EFI_SECURE_BOOT
kernel_configs.justification: Required for EFI Secure Boot lockdown across all kernels

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_LRU_GEN
kernel_configs.justification: Performance improvements via Kernel configuration parameters - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/12178

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_LRU_GEN_ENABLED
kernel_configs.justification: Performance improvements via Kernel configuration parameters - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/12178

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_LWTUNNEL
kernel_configs.justification: feat(kernel): Enable LWTUNNEL_BPF and SCHED_CORE - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/15607

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_LWTUNNEL_BPF
kernel_configs.justification: feat(kernel): Enable LWTUNNEL_BPF and SCHED_CORE - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/15607

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_MCTP
kernel_configs.justification: Do not enable mctp unless fix for CVE-2023-3439 is present - PR: https://github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/b561275d633bcd8e0e8055ab86f1a13df75a0269

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_NETFILTER_XT_TARGET_TRACE
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for the iptables TRACE target and HCI scenarios - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3480

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_NET_CLS_FLOWER
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer and HCI scenarios - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3480

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_NET_VENDOR_AQUANTIA
kernel_configs.justification: Enable Aquantia AQtion ethernet driver kernel configs - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/14638

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_PCI_HYPERV_INTERFACE
kernel_configs.justification: aarch64 config for kernel update to v5.15.32 - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/2735

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_PCI_P2PDMA
kernel_configs.justification: kernel: Align arm hv,xen,virtio modules with x86 to fix arm boot - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/8579

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_PERF_EVENTS_INTEL_CSTATE

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_PERF_EVENTS_INTEL_RAPL
kernel_configs.justification: Performance improvements via Kernel configuration parameters - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/12178

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_PLDMFW
kernel_configs.justification: Enable Intel Ethernet Connection E800 networking driver - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/10960

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_PTP_1588_CLOCK_KVM
kernel_configs.justification: Removes error boot message 'failed to initialize ptp kvm' - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3122

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_SCHEDSTATS
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_SCHED_CORE
kernel_configs.justification: feat(kernel): Enable LWTUNNEL_BPF and SCHED_CORE - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/15607

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_SECURITY_SMACK
kernel_configs.justification: Removed in favor of SELinux - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3080

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_TASK_DELAY_ACCT
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_TASK_IO_ACCOUNTING
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_TASK_XACCT
kernel_configs.justification: Needed for customer - PR: Initial Azure Linux PR

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_VCC
kernel_configs.justification: Needs to be off for CVE-2023-23039 - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/6574

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_VFIO_NOIOMMU
kernel_configs.justification: VMs may not have access to iommu - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/2385

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_VIRTIO_FS
kernel_configs.justification: Needed to see logs in Azure serial console - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/3264

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ZONE_DMA
kernel_configs.justification: results in large memory usage numbers - https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/12221

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_ZRAM
kernel_configs.justification: Enable ZRAM to align ARM and AMD offerings - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/7794

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_HSA_AMD_SVM
kernel_configs.justification: kernel does not enable HSA_AMD_SVM on arm64 - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/14660

kernel_configs.name: CONFIG_SQUASHFS_ZSTD
kernel_configs.justification: kernel: Enable CONFIG_SQUASHFS_ZSTD and CONFIG_FW_CFG_SYSFS - PR: https://github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/pull/15612

kernel_configs.justification: kernel-64k does not enable Intel ICE driver on arm64
